parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.ANTHROPIC_MODEL || 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 600, system: `You are a BD analyst for ${$env.ORG_NAME}. Given this week's outreach funnel metrics (JSON), write a concise performance brief: 3-5 bullet insights + 3 concrete recommendations to improve response & conversion next week (e.g. which industries to lean into, whether to raise/lower the send threshold, messaging tweaks). Plain text, no markdown headers, under 180 words.`, messages: [ { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify($json.metrics) } ] }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const m = $('Compute Metrics').item.json.metrics;
const insight = $json.content?.[0]?.text || '(no insights generated)';
const line = (k,v)=>`${k}: ${v}`;
const statusLines = Object.entries(m.byStatus).map(([k,v])=>`  - ${k}: ${v}`).join('\n');
const indLines = m.industryRates.slice(0,8).map(r=>`  - ${r.industry}: ${r.rate}% (${r.replied}/${r.contacted})`).join('\n') || '  - (not enough data yet)';
const body = [
  `PARTNERSHIP OUTREACH — WEEKLY REPORT (${$env.ORG_NAME})`,
  `Generated: ${$now.toISO()}`,
  '',
  '== FUNNEL ==',
  line('Total companies', m.total),
  line('Avg lead score', m.avgScore),
  line('Hot / Warm / Cold', `${m.byClass.Hot} / ${m.byClass.Warm} / ${m.byClass.Cold}`),
  line('Contacted', m.contacted),
  line('Replied (engaged)', m.replied),
  line('Negotiating', m.negotiating),
  line('Won', m.won),
  line('Response rate', m.responseRate + '%'),
  line('Win rate', m.winRate + '%'),
  '',
  '== BY STATUS ==',
  statusLines,
  '',
  '== RESPONSE RATE BY INDUSTRY ==',
  indLines,
  '',
  '== AI INSIGHTS ==',
  insight
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { subject: `Weekly Partnership Report — ${$env.ORG_NAME} (${m.responseRate}% response, ${m.won} won)`, body, to: $env.SENDER_EMAIL } }];
